# `smishing` — smishing templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 5

SMS phishing (smishing) simulation templates rendered as email. These train employees to recognize text-message-based phishing attacks.

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| USPS Package Delivery Smishing | [`package_delivery_sms.html`](package_delivery_sms.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 50-70% |
| Chase Bank Fraud Alert Smishing | [`bank_alert_sms.html`](bank_alert_sms.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 40-60% |
| SSO Portal MFA Phone Verification Smishing | [`mfa_verification_sms.html`](mfa_verification_sms.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 35-55% |
| HR Benefits Direct Deposit Smishing | [`payroll_hr_sms.html`](payroll_hr_sms.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 45-65% |
| IT Helpdesk Password Reset Smishing | [`it_helpdesk_sms.html`](it_helpdesk_sms.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 40-60% |

## Template details

### USPS Package Delivery Smishing

- **File:** [`package_delivery_sms.html`](package_delivery_sms.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 50-70%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/smishing_education.html`](education/smishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Action Required: Your USPS package could not be delivered
  - USPS: Package delivery attempt failed — reschedule required
  - Delivery Notification: Package #9400111206 requires action
- **Operator notes:** One of the highest click-rate attack vectors. Nearly universal — almost everyone orders packages. The phone mockup inside the email helps train employees to recognize the SMS format.

### Chase Bank Fraud Alert Smishing

- **File:** [`bank_alert_sms.html`](bank_alert_sms.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/smishing_education.html`](education/smishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - URGENT: Suspicious transaction on your account
  - Chase Alert: $847 Amazon purchase was blocked
  - ACTION REQUIRED: Verify recent transaction
- **Operator notes:** Fear of financial loss is a powerful motivator. Works across all employee levels. Specific dollar amount ($847) and merchant (Amazon) increase realism.

### SSO Portal MFA Phone Verification Smishing

- **File:** [`mfa_verification_sms.html`](mfa_verification_sms.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/smishing_education.html`](education/smishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Security Alert: Attempted MFA Verification Device Update
  - MFA Alert: Unrecognized mobile number change request
  - Action Required: Cancel pending phone number modification
- **Operator notes:** Exploits anxiety regarding unauthorized changes to security verification devices (MFA) in corporate systems.

### HR Benefits Direct Deposit Smishing

- **File:** [`payroll_hr_sms.html`](payroll_hr_sms.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 45-65%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/smishing_education.html`](education/smishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Action Required: Review updated payroll direct deposit options
  - HR Alert: Direct deposit banking verification needed
  - Notice: Confirm payroll details to prevent processing delays
- **Operator notes:** High engagement due to direct relation to employee compensation and banking configurations.

### IT Helpdesk Password Reset Smishing

- **File:** [`it_helpdesk_sms.html`](it_helpdesk_sms.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/smishing_education.html`](education/smishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - IT Support: Unrecognized login password change request
  - Helpdesk Notice: Confirm account password change for employee profile
  - Alert: Cancel unauthorized password reset attempt
- **Operator notes:** Simulates a helpdesk ticket notification about a password change attempt to steal login credentials.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
